case_title: RAJA JEWELLERS VS TITANIUM JEWELLERS (ARTIN BEDROSIAN)

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY RAJA JEWELLERS AS TO DEFENDANT TITANIUM JEWELLERS (ARTIN BEDROSIAN) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TITANIUM JEWELLERS (ARTIN BEDROSIAN)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAJA JEWELLERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TITANIUM JEWELLERS (ARTIN BEDROSIAN) $1,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, THE COURT ORDERS RESCISSION OF THE AGREEMENT TO FABRICATE THE YELLOW GOLD MARQUIS CUT RING. PLFT SHALL RETURN TO DEFT THE RING WHICH WAS INCORRRECT LY FABRICATED IN WHITE GOLD; & DEFT SHALL RETURN TO PLFT THE $750 PAID FOR THE RING. IN ADDITION THE COURT VOIDS THE AGREEMENT FOR THE PROPOSED CUSHION CUT RING; DEFT RETURN TO PLFT $300 DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
